allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); evs=d.get\('events',[]\); print\(f'{len\(evs\)} events'\); [print\(e['date'], e['name']\) for e in evs[:5]]")

Bash(curl -s "https://site.api.espn.com/apis/site/v2/sports/football/nfl/scoreboard?year=2026&week=1&seasontype=2" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); evs=d.get\('events',[]\); s=d.get\('leagues',[{}]\)[0].get\('season',{}\); print\('season year:', s.get\('year'\)\); print\('startDate:', s.get\('startDate'\)\); print\(f'{len\(evs\)} events'\); [print\(e['date'], e['name']\) for e in evs[:5]]")
